features: 12 in 1 Manicure & Pedicure Set - You will get an assortment of 12 different face, manicure and pedicure care tools together in a nice leather case. Each tool works well and cut cleanly, you have a tool for every purpose.

Durable & Sharp Material - Our professional nail clippers set is made of high quality stainless steel, great hardness, durable and anti-rust. All the nail care tools & accessories are carefully polished in order to give you a good trimming experience. NOTE: These tools are SHARP and very pointy, please keep out of the reach of children.

Multiple Functions - This is a very comprehensive set of nail clippers and other tools for personal care. Four types of fingernail and toenail cippers, nail file, cuticle nipper, acne needle, ear pick, eyebrow scissor, eyebrow tweezer and so on. A multipurpose kit meet your daily life needs, the perfect at-home DIY nail set, let you forget about the salon.

Portable Storage Case - 12 items come in a leather case which is well made and keeps the tools spaced and in place. In addition, the storage case with a press stud fastening is nice and slim which makes it fit perfectly into a side pocket of a bag and great for traveling.

Perfect Gift - Excellent quality manicure tools kit with a luxurious leather case is an ideal gift for back to school supplies,christmas, birthday, anniversary, valentine's day. You can give it to your friends, colleagues, family or yourself. Please feel free to contact us if you have any needs.
